The festival honored French filmmaker [[Agnès Varda]], who died early that year, featuring her on the official poster of the festival.{{cite news |title=Cannes Film Festival unveils its official 2019 poster |url=https://filmindustry.network/cannes-film-festival-unveils-its-official-2019-poster/35046 |publisher=Film Industry Network |date=15 April 2019}} The photograph used was taken during the filming of her debut film ''[[La Pointe Courte]]'' (1955), which screened at the Cannes Film Festival.
